proposal.title: Google Ads Growth Engine for Meridian Dental

data.intro:
Meridian Dental Group is spending on Google Ads without visibility into which clicks become booked patients. This proposal covers a full rebuild of your tracking foundation, a restructured Google Ads account, and ongoing management tied to cost per booked appointment rather than cost per click.

Everything below is scoped for your three locations and your current monthly budget of around 8,000 USD.
goals: Track booked appointments back to the exact keyword and ad that produced them
Reduce cost per booked appointment by 30 percent within 90 days
Build a reporting view your front desk team can actually read

scope.title: Tracking foundation
scope.description: Server-side tracking via a dedicated tagging server, wired into your booking system so offline conversions flow back into Google Ads.
deliverables: Server-side GTM container on a first-party subdomain
GCLID capture into your CRM on every form and call
Offline conversion import for booked and showed appointments
GA4 property cleanup and conversion audit

scope.title: Account rebuild
scope.description: Restructure of the Google Ads account around location-level campaigns with clean conversion signals.
deliverables: Keyword and search term audit of the last 12 months
Ad copy refresh with two variants per ad group
Negative keyword system and shared budgets

scope.title: Ongoing management
scope.description: Weekly optimization against cost per booked appointment, with a monthly review call.
deliverables: Weekly bid, budget, and search term reviews

timeline.title: Audit and access
timeline.description: Account access, tracking audit, booking system review.

timeline.title: Tracking build
timeline.description: Server-side container, GCLID pipeline, offline conversion import live.

timeline.title: Account rebuild
timeline.description: New structure launched, old campaigns wound down.

timeline.title: Optimization
timeline.description: Weekly management against cost per booked appointment.

items.label: Ongoing management
items.detail: Month to month, cancel with 30 days notice

items.label: Ad spend
items.detail: Paid directly to Google, not through us

pricing.notes: Management fee is flat, not a percentage of spend. No long-term contract.

terms: Setup fee is invoiced 50 percent on acceptance and 50 percent on tracking go-live.
Management runs month to month and can be cancelled with 30 days written notice.
Ad spend is paid directly to Google via your own billing profile.
All accounts, containers, and data remain your property.
